title: Basketball Game 篮球比赛
scene: Tom和Mike在篮球比赛中互相配合进攻。

lines.en: Mike, the game starts in five minutes!
I am ready. What position are you playing?
lines.zh: 我准备好了。你打什么位置？

lines.en: I will play guard. You play center.
OK. I will stay near the basket.
When I drive in, pass the ball to you.
lines.zh: 我突破进去的时候，把球传给你。

lines.en: Smart plan! Let us do it!
Here we go! I got the ball!
I am open! Pass it here!
Yes! Score! We make a great team!
lines.zh: 进了！得分了！我们配合得真棒！
